## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential advertising partnership between GrowthX AI and DeepAI](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX AI proposes a strategic partnership for content collaboration, backlinks, and mentions on DeepAI's high-traffic site](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [DeepAI currently uses AdSense, generating \~$400k/month; GrowthX suggests more targeted, higher-value advertising](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Next steps involve Brian discussing the proposition with Kevin (DeepAI CEO) to gauge interest and feasibility](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX AI's Business Model and Proposal

  - [VC-funded marketing agency with a proprietary platform](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Raised $12M Series A, currently raising Series B](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Proposes collaboration for content placement, backlinks, and mentions on DeepAI](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Aims to provide more relevant, higher-value advertising than current AdSense model](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Potential for content syndication and long-term partnership](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)

### DeepAI's Current Advertising Model

  - [Primarily uses Google AdSense](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Generates approximately $400,000 per month from banner ads](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Some content serves SEO purposes, which has been effective](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)

### Potential Benefits for DeepAI

  - [Higher-value advertising content aligned with site visitors' interests](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Improved user experience by replacing irrelevant ads](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Additional revenue stream without disrupting current model](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Potential for long-term partnerships with reputable brands](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)

### GrowthX AI's Clients and Their Needs

  - [Works with top AI and tech companies (e.g., Galileo AI, Surge, Webflow, Ramp, Reddit)](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Clients seeking high-quality backlinks, mentions, and targeted traffic](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Example: Augment Code looking to increase awareness, willing to invest significantly](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)

### Proposed Partnership Structure

  - [GrowthX AI would be the direct customer, representing multiple clients](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [Initial investment could start around $20k/month for backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [Potential to scale up significantly based on performance and client needs](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [Content collaboration and syndication opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)

### Challenges and Considerations

  - [DeepAI's decision-making process requires Kevin's involvement and number-crunching](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Need to ensure new content/links don't interfere with current SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Balancing potential long-term benefits against current reliable AdSense revenue](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Brian to discuss the proposal with Kevin (DeepAI CEO) at 9 AM](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Evaluate the potential impact on current business model and revenue](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Consider starting with a smaller-scale trial to prove value before larger commitment](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [GrowthX AI awaiting feedback on DeepAI's interest level before approaching their clients](https://fathom.video/share/eMu_idAxWALme-KAeSGpbKhxpuZdUc4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
